title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE TUNGA BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 7258 / 91 OG No. 43, 6999 (Oct. 23, 1995)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7727, May 19, 1994 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE TUNGA BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Tunga Barangay High School in the Municipality of Tunga, Province of Leyte, is hereby converted into a national high school, to be known as the Tunga National High School.

Sec. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, May 19, 1994.
